blockers_encountered.description: Version bump + v0.7.1 tag is a release act, but EU-7's real-corpus recall@10 (~0.83) is below the live 0.90 gate and the floor lock (PR-2) + canonical N=1M validation (PR-3) + tag/push (PR-4) are all 0.7.2 work.
blockers_encountered.resolution: HITL (2026-05-30) chose to DEFER the version bump + tag entirely to 0.7.2 PR-4. Workspace stays at 0.7.0; no set-version.sh / git tag run. Recorded in 0.7.1-implementation.md + STATUS.

agent_verify_result: pass -- docs-only; no engine diff (git diff --stat = CHANGELOG/docs/ADR/closure only). removal-changelog linter clean (### Removed present, no removed public symbols). markdownlint flagged only node_modules, none of the changed docs. NEED-017/REQ-033 cross-cites resolve.
tag_decision: deferred to 0.7.2 PR-4 (HITL 2026-05-30); workspace version remains 0.7.0; not pushed.
next_step_for_orchestrator: 0.7.1 EMBEDDER-UNDEFER campaign is CLOSED (docs done; tag deferred). Optional codex review of the EU-8 docs diff. Proceed to 0.7.2 RELEASE-HARDENING PR-0 (reconciliation) -> PR-2 (floor re-derivation from the EU-7 anchor in 0.7.1-EU-7-output.json) -> PR-3 (canonical N=1M AC validation) -> PR-4 (version/tag/push).
